title: PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, hygiene items as available, and household goods, including bedding and kitchenware. Diapers are available through PDX Diaper Bank. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and household items. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clothing and Hygiene supplies: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 771-7914 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 82nd and Cornwell are the nearest cross streets. Located near the intersection of 82nd and Johnson Creek Boulevard. Turn left on Cornwell, just past the Fred Meyer parking lot and O'Reilly Auto Parts. Served by TriMet Bus Line 72 (82nd Avenue). Services: Bedding/Linen Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Diapers General Clothing Provision Kitchenware Kitchenware Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND MEALS MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWERS AND LAUNDRY OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES AND NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
